texto: There were a lot of people dreaming about making films, and they would finance maybe 6 films a year. Because they were funded by the government, the films sort-of had to deal with serious social issues - and, as a result, nobody went to see those films.
explicacao: Citação de Renny Harlin sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “There were a lot of people dreaming about making films, and they would finance maybe 6 films a ye…” articula motivacao, government, people em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como people e see.
